items.builder_takeaway: Practical, well-explained guidance for a common Postgres scaling issue. Directly relevant to anyone running Postgres with growing tables.

items.title: The only scalable delete in Postgres is DROP TABLE
items.uncertainty: PlanetScale has a MySQL product interest, but the Postgres analysis appears technically sound.
